title: icy indulgent indian potato udupi vada pav
description: floral and light, date-night udupi-inspired dish featuring crispy potato dumplings in toasted tortilla bread, served in individual mini cocottes. kosher-friendly and perfect for a romantic evening.
instructions: in a mixing bowl, mash the boiled potatoes and mix in the chickpea flour, ghee, green chilies, ginger, lemon juice, cumin powder, chili powder, and salt.
divide the mixture into 12 equal portions and shape each portion into a round dumpling.
heat oil in a deep frying pan and fry the dumplings until they are golden brown and crispy.
drain the fried dumplings on paper towels and toast the tortillas in a toaster or in the oven for a few minutes until crispy.
assemble the vada pav by placing 2 fried dumplings on each tortilla, garnished with chopped cilantro and a sprinkle of dried mint.
serve the vada pav hot in individual mini cocottes.
